title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: The video argues that junior cloud engineers should shift focus from coding proficiency alone to understanding fundamentals like security, reliability, cost, and performance, then leverage AI agents to accelerate development while reviewing outputs against those principles. Practical skills and systems thinking now matter more than writing code from scratch.
